title: phegopteris deflexa
intro: Phegopteris deflexa, also known as the black spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, Phegopteris deflexa has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Phegopteris deflexa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
